content: TASK-032 interrupt done: 2D area overlays now render with stable back-to-front ordering independent of Add info toggle order: layer bands, then zone, then boundary, then subgraph. Parent/nested boxes within each area type are ordered by depth. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
